mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRANSACTION_LOG ( transaction_id, from_account, to_account, amount, tx_type, memo, balance_after, created_at ) VALUES ( 'TXN-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(SEQ_TRANSACTION.NEXTVAL, 6, '0'), #{fromAccount}, #{toAccount}, #{amount}, #{txType}, #{memo}, #{balanceAfter}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO WITHDRAWAL_LEDGER ( withdrawal_id, account_no, amount, balance_after, withdrawal_type, transfer_id, memo, created_at ) VALUES ( #{withdrawalId}, #{accountNo}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{withdrawalType}, #{transferId}, #{memo}, SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO DEPOSIT_LEDGER ( deposit_id, account_no, amount, balance_after, deposit_type, transfer_id, memo, created_at ) VALUES ( #{depositId}, #{accountNo}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{depositType}, #{transferId}, #{memo}, SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO TRANSFER ( transfer_id, from_account, to_account, amount, memo, transfer_type, status, withdrawal_id, deposit_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{transferId}, #{fromAccount}, #{toAccount}, #{amount}, #{memo}, #{transferType}, #{status}, #{withdrawalId}, #{depositId}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
